title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 31 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 31 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 31 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 31/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 3.34%.the main contract closed 897. the quotation in the morning was increased by 10-20 yuan/mt overyesterday. Most traders adopt separate quotations，Steel mills cautious purchasing.
